subcodes.first_line: O thou twig of the Sacred Lote-Tree! The Dispensations of the past manifested either the splendour of the divine Beauty or the radiance of the divine Glory
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنون سدره مبارکه در ادوار سابقه یا ظهور تجلی جمال بود و یا سطوع انوار
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God
